data.title: Gov’t can realize gains on gold certificates to buy Bitcoin: Bo Hines
data.description:
The Trump administration appears poised to grow its Strategic Bitcoin Reserve after the White House’s crypto council head suggested budget-neutral ways for acquiring the digital asset. 
“There’s been countless ideas” about how the government can acquire more Bitcoin (BTC), Bo Hines, executive director of the President’s Council of Advisers on Digital Assets, said in an interview with the Crypto in America podcast. 


Bo Hines said the crypto council is open to creative ways to build the government’s Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. Source: Eleanor Terrett
Perhaps the best way of doing so would be to realize the gains on the government’s gold certificates, which are priced far less than bullion is actually worth today
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/govt-realize-gains-gold-certificates-buy-bitcoin-bo-hines?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Micron’s Stock Drops Amid NAND Oversupply, Lower Margin Forecast
data.description:
Micron Technology's stock dropped today due to concerns over profit margins impacted by an oversupply of NAND Flash chips..

data.title: Trump Announces Flexible Tariff Policies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced that tariffs will be implemented with flexibility. He emphasized that the approach will primarily be reciprocal.

data.title: Sky Governance Approves Reduction in Savings Rate
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Sky Governance has approved a reduction in the Sky savings rate to 4.5%. This change is scheduled to take effect on March 24 at 14:00 UTC.

data.title: Who’s running in Trump’s race to make US a ‘Bitcoin superpower?'
data.description:
US President Donald Trump wants to make his country a “Bitcoin superpower,” but the question remains as to who he is competing against. 
Speaking at Blockwork’s Digital Asset Summit on March 20 to a crowd of crypto industry executives and observers, he said, “Together we will make America the undisputed Bitcoin superpower and the crypto capital of the world.”
The US crypto industry has benefited greatly from preferential executive orders from Trump’s White House, including the establishment of a “strategic Bitcoin reserve” — a move advocates regard as a key metric for Bitcoin adoption.  
However, many other countries, including major US trade partners, are just not ready to take on Bitcoin as a reserve asset, begging the question of who the US is competing against to become a “Bitcoin superpower
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/whos-running-trumps-race-us-bitcoin-superpower?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: LBank will list LoomSync (LOOM)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch LoomSync (LOOM) at 00:00 (SGT) on March 22, 2025, and open the LOOM/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 00:00 on March 22, 2025, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 16:00 on March 23, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase CEO responds to Tornado Cash's partial address removal from sanctions list: Privacy is an important need for legitimate users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Regarding the removal of some Tornado Cash addresses from the sanctions list by the US Treasury Department OFAC, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong said: "No one wants bad guys to use cryptocurrency, but privacy is an important function for many law-abiding citizens, and open source code cannot be sanctioned (this is a freedom of speech issue) - I am glad to see this problem fixed." He added that Coinbase looks forward to working with the Treasury Department to find solutions to combat about 0.1% of illegal activities in cryptocurrency without violating US laws and values. This proportion is much lower than cash or traditional banking systems.

data.title: Whales bought 7,074 ETH today, worth $13.8 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, a whale address has bought a total of 7,074 ETH today, with a total value of approximately $13.8 million at the current price.
The address withdrew 4,511 ETH (approximately $8.81 million) from OKX 3 hours ago and deposited it into Aave as collateral, then borrowed $5 million USDT and transferred it back to OKX to buy an additional 2,563 ETH (approximately $5 million).
